---
params:
    runID: NULL
    selectRDs: NULL
    reinstall: FALSE
    token: NULL
---
```{r ClinicalRun, include=FALSE, cache=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
mount_path <- "/Volumes/CBioinformatics/jonathan/Rprojects"
main_script <- file.path(mount_path,"Methylation-scripts/readSheet_GenerateReport.R")
if(is.null(params$runID)){message("Try setting the runID params:\n> runID <- \"21-MGDM##\"")}

critialMnts <-c( "/Volumes/CBioinformatics/jonathan", "/Volumes/molecular/MOLECULAR LAB ONLY", "/Volumes/snudem01labspace/idats")

checkMounts <- function(driveMount){
    if(!dir.exists(driveMount)){
        warning("PATH does not exist, ensure path is mounted:\n",driveMount)
        message(crayon::bgRed(
                "You must mount each of the following paths:\n
                smb://research-cifs.nyumc.org/Research/CBioinformatics/\n
                smb://research-cifs.nyumc.org/Research/snudem01lab/snudem01labspace\n
                smb://shares-cifs.nyumc.org/apps/acc_pathology/molecular\n"))
        stopifnot(dir.exists(driveMount))
}}

for(i in critialMnts){checkMounts(i)}
if (file.exists(main_script)) {
    gb <- globalenv(); sys.source(main_script, gb)
    gb$setVar("runID", params$runID); gb$setVar("ApiToken", params$token)
    methylPath <- gb$setRunDir(gb$runID); setwd(methylPath)
    varNm <- gb$getDefaults(); varNm$ApiToken <- gb$ApiToken; gb$printParams(varNm)
    # Loads pipeline or installs new
    if(params$reinstall){gb$install.or.load(instNew = T, rmpkg = T)}else{gb$install.or.load(instNew = F, rmpkg = F)}
    }else{message("main_script path not found:\n", crayon::bgGreen(mount_path),"\nEdit using gb$setVar('main_script','path/to/script')")}

if (file.exists(main_script)) {
    if(is.null(gb$ApiToken)){warning("You are missing ApiToken")}
    gb$copyWorksheetFile(runID=gb$runID) # copies the xlsm file
    gb$readSheetWrite() # reads xlsm and generates input .csv samplesheet
    gb$get.idats() # Copy idat files to current folder from molecular and snuderlabspace to cwd
    gb$moveSampleSheet(gb$methDir) #copies outputs temp to desktop for QC.Rmd
    gb$startRun(params$selectRDs)
}

```
